$schema: County config for Beaver scraper roster. Add real counties here, then run: pnpm seed:counties

counties.name: Sonoma County Board of Supervisors
counties.notes: Legistar — civic-scraper LegistarSite. timezone is required: LegistarSite passes it straight into pytz.timezone() with no default, so omitting it raises UnknownTimeZoneError on every event (see DEBUG-LOG.md).
